root_text.sn52.14:1.1: “Imesañca panāhaṁ, āvuso, catunnaṁ satipaṭṭhānānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā parasattānaṁ parapuggalānaṁ cetasā ceto paricca pajānāmi—

translation_text.sn52.14:1.1: “… And it’s because of developing and cultivating these four kinds of mindfulness meditation that I understand the minds of other beings and individuals, having encompassed them with my mind.
translation_text.sn52.14:1.2: I understand mind with greed as ‘mind with greed’ …
translation_text.sn52.14:1.3: I understand unfreed mind as ‘unfreed mind’.”
